description: Style NoteThis forever classic and trendy black bag from murciais a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples.Product DetailsLeatherette upper with contrast stitch detailing for durabilityOne main zipped compartment with two zipped pockets and an insert pocketTwo short handles for carrying easeStud and zip detail on the front and back for styleZipped pocket on the backBranding on the frontMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 26 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 11 cm
